```
2055dc1 Checkpoint: Mobile web UX improvements: taller tab bar (72px) with larger icons (28px) and elevated shadow, FAB repositioned above tab bar (bottom: 96), control buttons enlarged to 52×52px, marker card raised to bottom: 104 with improved shadow, stats strip repositioned, sightings tab bar with taller tap targets (paddingVertical: 14) and active highlight, larger header and sort button, bigger sighting cards (minHeight: 96). 0 TypeScript errors.
b197d10 Checkpoint: Complete feature pass: offline cache + delta sync, proximity alerts (2km radius), swipe-to-vote gestures, multi-plate ALPR picker, shareable links (Web Share API + clipboard fallback), CSV/JSON export for plate history, embeddable map widget (/widget route), anomaly detection endpoint, plate search bar, recent plates list, widget shortcut button on map. All 14 tests pass, 0 TypeScript errors.
d75fd55 Checkpoint: Major enhancement release: dark CartoDB map tiles, custom SVG markers with agency colors and pulse animations, marker clustering, AI vehicle/agency/badge identification, convoy detection algorithm, trending plates screen with 24h rankings, distance labels on sighting cards, confirmed-by-multiple badge, watch/notify for plates, camera screen with license plate targeting overlay and GPS pre-warm, full dark theme across all screens, and Leaflet global initialization fix.
be99701 Checkpoint: Implemented real-time updates with 10-second polling, user-centered map view, and live notification badges showing new sightings as they appear. Map now loads all 500 most recent sightings and centers on user's location.
223b4d8 Checkpoint: Added automatic license plate recognition using AI vision and real-time plate tracking. Users can now auto-extract plates from photos and view complete movement history for any vehicle.
f5668bf Checkpoint: Converted Vehicle Tracker to web application with browser-based camera, geolocation, and Leaflet maps. All features work in browser without native dependencies.
55468e2 Checkpoint: Vehicle Tracker mobile app with photo capture, GPS tracking, real-time map, community verification system, and anonymous voting. All core features implemented and tested.
53366af Initial project bootstrap

```

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="run_terminal_command_v2">
<details><summary>Tool use: **run_terminal_command_v2** • Run command: git status --short --untracked-files=all -- "nextjs-temp/convex/schema.ts" "convex/schema.ts" && git diff --no-index -- /dev/null "nextjs-temp/convex/schema.ts"</summary>

```bash
git status --short --untracked-files=all -- "nextjs-temp/convex/schema.ts" "convex/schema.ts" && git diff --no-index -- /dev/null "nextjs-temp/convex/schema.ts"
```

```
?? convex/schema.ts
?? nextjs-temp/convex/schema.ts
diff --git a/nextjs-temp/convex/schema.ts b/nextjs-temp/convex/schema.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..0a1e982
--- /dev/null
+++ b/nextjs-temp/convex/schema.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,51 @@
+import { defineSchema, defineTable } from "convex/server";
+import { v } from "convex/values";
+
+export default defineSchema({
+  sightings: defineTable({
+    licensePlate: v.string(),
+    vehicleType: v.optional(v.string()),
+    photoId: v.optional(v.id("_storage")),
+    latitude: v.number(),
+    longitude: v.number(),
+    locationAccuracy: v.optional(v.number()),
+    locationAddress: v.optional(v.string()),
+    notes: v.optional(v.string()),
+    photoMetadata: v.optional(v.string()),
+    deviceId: v.string(),
+    
+    // AI fields
+    agencyType: v.optional(v.string()),
+    agencyMarkings: v.optional(v.string()),
+    vehicleMake: v.optional(v.string()),
+    vehicleModel: v.optional(v.string()),
+    vehicleColor: v.optional(v.string()),
+    badgeNumber: v.optional(v.string()),
+    uniformDescription: v.optional(v.string()),
+    aiConfidence: v.optional(v.number()),
+    embedding: v.optional(v.array(v.float64())), // For RAG
+
+    // Community
+    upvotes: v.number(),
+    downvotes: v.number(),
+    flagCount: v.number(),
+    credibilityScore: v.number(),
+    isHidden: v.boolean(),
+  })
+    .index("by_licensePlate", ["licensePlate"])
+    .index("by_deviceId", ["deviceId"])
+    .index("by_credibility", ["credibilityScore"])
+    // Vector index for RAG
+    .vectorIndex("by_embedding", {
+      vectorField: "embedding",
+      dimensions: 768, // Adjust if using a different model (e.g. 1536 for openAI)
+    }),
+
+  votes: defineTable({
+    sightingId: v.id("sightings"),
+    deviceId: v.string(),
+    voteType: v.union(v.literal("upvote"), v.literal("downvote"), v.literal("flag")),
+  })
+    .index("by_sightingId", ["sightingId"])
+    .index("by_deviceId_sightingId", ["deviceId", "sightingId"]),
+});

```
</details>
</tool-use>
